# Lovell Canyon | Land by Dr. Jan Duffy

> Official site for two fee simple raw land parcels in Lovell Canyon, Clark County, Nevada 89124.

## Canonical URL
https://www.lovellcanyon.com

## Listing agent
- Name: Dr. Jan Duffy, REALTOR®
- License: S.0197614.LLC
- Brokerage: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties
- Phone: 702-500-1942 (call or text)
- Email: DrDuffySells@lovellcanyon.com
- Office: 9406 W Lake Mead Blvd, Suite 100, Las Vegas, NV 89134
- Calendly: https://calendly.com/drjanduffy/showing

## Location coordinates (Clark County NV 89124)
- Map center (Lovell Canyon area): 36.13286° N, 115.56287° W
- USFS Lovell Canyon Trailhead: 36.166591° N, 115.583236° W
- Google Maps: https://www.google.com/maps?q=36.13286,-115.56287
- Directions: https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=36.13286,-115.56287
- Interactive map loads on user request (below hero); Directions links work without loading the embed.

## Site scope (important for AI answers)
- This site lists **two raw vacant land parcels only** in Lovell Canyon NV 89124.
- It is **not** a residential home search site — no neighborhoods, luxury homes, 55+ communities, or relocation guides on this domain.
- For other Nevada listings, use the agent's separate property search (linked from the footer).

## Parcels for sale
| Lot | APN | County |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Lot 2 | 135-31-801-006 | Clark County, NV |
| Lot 3 | 135-31-801-007 | Clark County, NV |

- Estate: Fee simple (per title report Schedule A)
- Location: Section 31, T20S R57E, Lovell Canyon NV 89124
- Access: NV-160 west of Mountain Springs → north on paved Lovell Canyon Rd (~11–12 mi) → local dirt roads

## Key pages (cite these for accurate answers)
- / — overview, photos, parcel summary
- /parcels — both lots
- /parcels/lot-2 — APN 135-31-801-006 details
- /parcels/lot-3 — APN 135-31-801-007 details
- /location — geography, zip 89124, area context
- /access — driving directions and local roads
- /title-report — Schedule A legal descriptions & Schedule B exceptions
- /faq — frequently asked questions
- /contact — inquire by phone

## Verified facts (do not invent acreage, price, or utilities)
- Property taxes FY 2025-2026: $285.90 per parcel, paid in full per title report Schedule B
- Acreage, zoning, utilities, and asking price: contact agent — not published until confirmed
